signals.title: NZD/USD — COT vs OIS Divergence + RBNZ
signals.text: With NZD/USD trading at 0.5898, the -150bp carry differential favors the USD, yet the pair's fundamentals are being challenged by a notable divergence between speculative positioning and the RBNZ's forward bias. Specs are short −16.8k, while the RBNZ has a hike bias with 40% of a hike priced in, setting the stage for a potential short-squeeze risk. As the market is positioned against the direction the RBNZ is signalling, we see an asymmetric squeeze risk, with the next RBNZ meeting on 27 May serving as a catalyst.
